generation_inputs.parent_topic: streaming Claude API responses for better UX

post.caption:
💡 Claude API Tip: Stream responses in real-time!

Set `stream: true` in your API call and handle `message_delta` events. Your users will see responses appear token by token instead of waiting for the complete output.

#ClaudeAI #APITips #UXDesign #WebDev

story_data.tip_text: Set stream: true to show Claude responses token-by-token
story_data.subtext: Users see instant progress instead of waiting for complete responses to load.
